results.title: First aid for fractures: introduction
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “First Aid for Fractures”.
Explains recognition and general first aid treatment of fractures, with emphasis on fractures of the extremities. Includes descriptions of greenstick, impacted and comminuted fractures.
results.description:

Demonstrates step by step how to apply a universal leg splint to fractures of the lower extremity.

results.title: The Triangular arm splint
results.creator_credit: United States. Dept. of the Navy
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “First Aid for Fractures”
Demonstrates step by step how to apply a triangular arm splint, and shows how it is employed in combination with a single padded basswood splint for fractures of the upper or lower arm.

results.title: The Thomas leg splint
results.brief_description:

Demonstrates step by step how to apply a Thomas leg splint (half-ring) to immobilise any fractures of the thigh, knee or leg.

results.title: Skull, spine, and pelvis
results.creator_credit: Pathescope Company of America and United States. Dept. of the Navy
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “First Aid for Fractures”.
Explains the seriousness of fractures of the skull, spine and pelvis. Through a series of simulated cases aboard ship and in the field, depicts specific procedures for recognising and treating each of these types of fractures. Suitable for medical and nursing professions and training of students.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Pathescope Company of America and United States. Dept. of the Navy
